SEARCH
Package ai.alumnium

Class Alumni

java.lang.Object
ai.alumnium.Alumni
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class Alumni extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Public entry point for the Java client.

Driver selection uses exhaustive switch pattern matching on the supplied native driver object. Supported driver types:

  • AppiumDriver → AppiumDriver
  • Page → PlaywrightDriver
  • WebDriver → SeleniumDriver

    • doGoal

      public DoResult doGoal(String goal)
      Executes a series of steps to achieve the given goal. Named doGoal because do is a reserved word in Java.

    • perform

      public DoResult perform(String goal)
      Alias for doGoal(String) to match the Python do(...) name.

      Clear all learning examples from the server session.
